metadata.description: The name of the existing User Assigned Managed Identity.
The resource group name where the existing UAMI lives.
Reference to an existing User Assigned Managed Identity (UAMI).
The name of the model deployment.
The model name to deploy.
The model version to deploy (optional).
The model format to deploy.
The SKU name for the model deployment.
The SKU capacity for the model deployment.
The Responsible AI policy name (optional).
Model deployment definition for a Foundry account.
The Azure region where this Foundry account/project is deployed.
Model deployments to create under this region-scoped Foundry account.
Optional suffix for account/project naming. Defaults to location.
Region-scoped Foundry deployment definition.
Index of the UAMI in `existingUserAssignedIdentities` whose principalId receives the role.
Role definition GUID to grant at Foundry account scope.
Index of the Foundry account in `foundryDeployments`.
A (UAMI, role definition, account index) tuple generated for role assignment iterations.
The Microsoft Entra principal (object) ID that receives the role.
Role definition GUID to grant at Foundry account scope.
Index of the Foundry account in `foundryDeployments`.
A (principal object ID, role definition, account index) tuple generated for role assignment iterations.
Index of the Foundry account in `foundryDeployments`.
The model deployment payload.
A (account index, model) tuple generated for model deployment iterations.
The name of the scenario, used to derive resource names
Foundry deployment definitions. Each entry defines one region-scoped Foundry account/project and its models.
Tags applied to all resources
Optional. Array of existing User Assigned Managed Identities (UAMI) to grant Azure AI Foundry inference permissions. Defaults to an empty array, in which case no UAMI is attached.

Optional. Array of object (principal) IDs of existing Microsoft Entra service principals to grant Azure AI Foundry inference permissions. Defaults to an empty array, in which case no service principal is attached.
Optional. Array of object IDs of existing Microsoft Entra users to grant Azure AI Foundry inference permissions. Defaults to an empty array, in which case no user is attached.
Disable local authentication (API keys) on the Azure AI Foundry account. Set to false to enable API key based authentication.
Enable Azure Monitor based observability resources (Log Analytics, Application Insights, diagnostic settings, and Foundry project tracing connection).
Role definition GUIDs assigned to every existing UAMI, service principal, and user at Azure AI Foundry account scope.

variables.uamiRolePairs: [flatten(map(range(0, length(parameters('existingUserAssignedIdentities'))), lambda('uamiIndex', flatten(map(parameters('roleDefinitionIds'), lambda('roleDefinitionGuid', map(range(0, length(parameters('foundryDeployments'))), lambda('accountIndex', createObject('uamiIndex', lambdaVariables('uamiIndex'), 'roleDefinitionGuid', lambdaVariables('roleDefinitionGuid'), 'accountIndex', lambdaVariables('accountIndex'))))))))))]
variables.servicePrincipalRolePairs: [flatten(map(parameters('existingServicePrincipalObjectIds'), lambda('principalId', flatten(map(parameters('roleDefinitionIds'), lambda('roleDefinitionGuid', map(range(0, length(parameters('foundryDeployments'))), lambda('accountIndex', createObject('principalId', lambdaVariables('principalId'), 'roleDefinitionGuid', lambdaVariables('roleDefinitionGuid'), 'accountIndex', lambdaVariables('accountIndex'))))))))))]
variables.userRolePairs: [flatten(map(parameters('existingUserObjectIds'), lambda('principalId', flatten(map(parameters('roleDefinitionIds'), lambda('roleDefinitionGuid', map(range(0, length(parameters('foundryDeployments'))), lambda('accountIndex', createObject('principalId', lambdaVariables('principalId'), 'roleDefinitionGuid', lambdaVariables('roleDefinitionGuid'), 'accountIndex', lambdaVariables('accountIndex'))))))))))]

The name of the existing Azure AI Foundry (Cognitive Services) account that diagnostic settings will be applied to. Provide either this or targetServerName.

The diagnostic metric settings to configure

id.value: [coalesce(coalesce(if(not(empty(parameters('targetServerName'))), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.DBforPostgreSQL/flexibleServers', if(not(empty(parameters('targetServerName'))), parameters('targetServerName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings', parameters('name')), null()), if(not(empty(parameters('targetAccountName'))), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', if(not(empty(parameters('targetAccountName'))), parameters('targetAccountName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings', parameters('name')), null())), '')]

metadata.description: The name of the diagnostic settings resource
The name of the parent Azure AI Foundry account
The name of the parent Azure AI Foundry project
The name of the connection resource
The connection category for the Foundry project
The target endpoint or resource ID for the connection
Optional credential key used for ApiKey-based connections
The Azure region of the connected resource
The Azure resource ID of the connected resource
Whether the connection is shared to all resources in the project

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', parameters('parentAccountName'), parameters('parentProjectName'), parameters('name'))]
resources.properties: [shallowMerge(createArray(createObject('authType', 'ApiKey', 'category', parameters('category'), 'target', parameters('target')), if(empty(parameters('credentialKey')), createObject(), createObject('credentials', createObject('key', parameters('credentialKey')))), createObject('isSharedToAll', parameters('isSharedToAll'), 'metadata', createObject('ApiType', 'Azure', 'ResourceId', parameters('resourceId'), 'location', parameters('location')))))]

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}', parameters('parentAccountName'), parameters('name'))]
resources.properties: [shallowMerge(createArray(createObject('model', shallowMerge(createArray(createObject('format', parameters('modelFormat'), 'name', parameters('modelName')), if(empty(parameters('modelVersion')), createObject(), createObject('version', parameters('modelVersion')))))), if(empty(parameters('raiPolicyName')), createObject(), createObject('raiPolicyName', parameters('raiPolicyName')))))]
